name: Fortune Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, cornstarch, and oil in a bowl.
2. Fold in the beaten egg white.
3. Add vanilla and water to the mixture.
4. In a small skillet (non-stick or lightly oiled), over medium heat, pour 1 tablespoon of batter into a 3-inch circle.
5. Cook for 4 minutes until lightly browned.
6. Turn with a spatula and cook an additional minute.
7. Remove from the pan carefully as it will be hot.
8. Place a paper fortune strip in the center of the circle.
9. Fold the cookie in half over the edge of a glass, then bend to form the fortune-cookie shape.
10. Hold until cool, or place in an egg carton to hold the shape until the cookies firm up.
